--- title: Two-Factor ANOVA subtitle: Practice Problems for PSY 241 author: Guenther, Benjamin A. project: type: website output-dir: docs format: html: html-math-method: mathjax self-contained-math: false embed-resources: false jupyter: python3 --- # Problem 1 ``` {.python .cell-code} levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3) levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3) n = random.randint(5,15) FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA() ``` Given the following data, use a use a 2-Factor ANOVA with $\alpha = {0.01}$ to analyze the following data


## Full Group Summary Data
$T_{A1B1} = {324} \quad M_{A1B1} = {46.29}\quad SS_{A1B1} = {141.43} \quad n_{A1B1} = {7}$
$T_{A1B2} = {326} \quad M_{A1B2} = {46.57}\quad SS_{A1B2} = {55.71} \quad n_{A1B2} = {7}$
$T_{A2B1} = {237} \quad M_{A2B1} = {33.86}\quad SS_{A2B1} = {96.86} \quad n_{A2B1} = {7}$
$T_{A2B2} = {307} \quad M_{A2B2} = {43.86}\quad SS_{A2B2} = {78.86} \quad n_{A2B2} = {7}$
$T_{A3B1} = {288} \quad M_{A3B1} = {41.14}\quad SS_{A3B1} = {102.86} \quad n_{A3B1} = {7}$
$T_{A3B2} = {350} \quad M_{A3B2} = {50.0}\quad SS_{A3B2} = {84.0} \quad n_{A3B2} = {7}$
$\Sigma X^2 = {81576}$
$G = {1832}$

## Stage 1 ANOVA Calculations

Calculate the Degrees of Freedom: $df_{total}, df_{within}, \text{ and } df_{between}$

$df_{total} = N - 1$

$df_{total} = {42} - 1$

$df_{total} = {41}$


$df_{between} = k - 1$

$df_{between} = {6} - 1$

$df_{between} = {5}$


$df_{within} = N - K$

$df_{within} = {42} - {6}$

$df_{within} = {36}$


Calculate the Sum of Squares: $SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}$

$SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}$

$SS_{total} = {81576} - \frac{1832^2}{42}$

$SS_{total} = {81576} - \frac{3356224}{42}$

$SS_{total} = {81576} - {79910.1}$

$SS_{total} = {1665.9}$


$SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}$

$SS_{within} = {141.43 + 55.71 + 96.86 + 78.86 + 102.86 + 84.0}$

$SS_{within} = {559.72}$


$SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}$

$SS_{between} = {1665.9} - {559.72}$

$SS_{between} = {1106.18}$


note: the other way to calculate $SS_{betwen}$ is:

$SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}$




## Stage 2 calculations for $Factor_A$

Summary Data for Factor_A
$T_{A_1} = {650} \quad n_{A_1} = {14}$
$T_{A_2} = {544} \quad n_{A_2} = {14}$
$T_{A_3} = {638} \quad n_{A_3} = {14}$

State the Hypotheses
$H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2 = \mu_3$
$H_1:$ At least one mean is different

partition df for $Factor_A$

$df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1$

$df_{Factor_A} = {3} - 1$

$df_{Factor_A} = {2}$


The decision criteria:

$F_{crit} = {5.25}, \alpha = {0.01}$

Partition the SS for $Factor_A$

Calculate $SS_{Factor_A}$

$\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{650}^2}{14} + \frac{{544}^2}{14} + \frac{{638}^2}{14}} - \frac{{1832}^2}{42}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{422500}}{14} + \frac{{295936}}{14} + \frac{{407044}}{14}} - \frac{{3356224}}{42}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {{30178.57} + {21138.29} + {29074.57}} - {79910.1}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {80391.43} - {79910.1}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {481.33}$

Mean Squares for ${Factor_A}$

$MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}$

$MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{481.33}{2}$

$MS_{Factor_A} = {240.66}$

Calculate the F-Ratio for ${Factor_A}$

$F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}$

$F_{Factor_A} = \frac{240.66}{15.55}$

$F_{Factor_A} = {15.48}$


Calculate $\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{481.33}{{1665.9} - {427.52} - {197.33}}$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{481.33}{1041.05}$

$\eta_p^2 = {0.46}$

The results:

reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,

$F({2}, {36}) = {15.48}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.46}$

## Stage 2 calculations for $Factor_B$

Summary Data for Factor_B
$T_{B_1} = {849} \quad n_{B_1} = {21}$
$T_{B_2} = {983} \quad n_{B_2} = {21}$

State the Hypotheses
$H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2$
$H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2$

partition df for $Factor_B$

$df_{Factor_B} = k_{Factor_B} - 1$

$df_{Factor_B} = {2} - 1$

$df_{Factor_B} = {1}$


The decision criteria:

$F_{crit} = {7.4}, \alpha = {0.01}$

Partition the SS for $Factor_B$

Calculate $SS_{Factor_B}$

$\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}$

$SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{849}^2}{21} + \frac{{983}^2}{21}} - \frac{{1832}^2}{42}$

$SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{720801}}{21} + \frac{{966289}}{21}} - \frac{{3356224}}{42}$

$SS_{Factor_B} = {{34323.86} + {46013.76}} - {79910.1}$

$SS_{Factor_B} = {80337.62} - {79910.1}$

$SS_{Factor_B} = {427.52}$

Mean Squares for ${Factor_B}$

$MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{SS_{Factor_B}}{df_{Factor_B}}$

$MS_{Factor_B} = \frac{427.52}{1}$

$MS_{Factor_B} = {427.52}$

Calculate the F-Ratio for ${Factor_B}$

$F_{Factor_B} = \frac{MS_{Factor_B}}{MS_{Within}}$

$F_{Factor_B} = \frac{427.52}{15.55}$

$F_{Factor_B} = {27.49}$


Calculate $\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_B$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_B}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{427.52}{{1665.9} - {481.33} - {197.33}}$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{427.52}{987.24}$

$\eta_p^2 = {0.43}$

The results:

reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,

$F({1}, {36}) = {27.49}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.43}$

## Stage 2 calculations for the $AxB$ interaction


State the Hypotheses
$H_0:$ There is no AxB interation
$H_1:$ There is an AxB interaction

Partition df for the interaction

$df_{AxB} = df_{Between} -df_{Factor_A} - df_{Factor_B}$

$df_{AxB} = {5} - {2} - {1}$

$df_{AxB} = {2}$



The decision criteria:

$F_{crit} = {5.25}, \alpha = {0.01}$

Partition the SS for $AxB$

Calculate $SS_{AxB}$

$SS_{{AxB}} = SS_{{Between}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}$

$SS_{AxB} = {1106.18} - {481.33} - {427.52}$

$SS_{AxB} = {197.33}$

Mean Squares for ${AxB}$

$MS_{AxB} = \frac{SS_{AxB}}{df_{AxB}}$

$MS_{AxB} = \frac{197.33}{2}$

$MS_{AxB} = {98.66}$

Calculate the F-Ratio for ${AxB}$

$F_{AxB} = \frac{MS_{AxB}}{MS_{Within}}$

$F_{AxB} = \frac{98.66}{15.55}$

$F_{AxB} = {6.34}$


Calculate $\eta_p^2 \text{ for } AxB$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{AxB}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_A}} - SS_{{Factor_B}}}}$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{197.33}{{1665.9} - {481.33} - {427.52}}$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{197.33}{757.05}$

$\eta_p^2 = {0.26}$

The results:

reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,

$F({2}, {36}) = {6.34}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.26}$ # Problem 2 ``` {.python .cell-code} levels_factor_a = random.randint(2,3) levels_factor_b = random.randint(2,3) n = random.randint(5,15) FactorialData(design = (levels_factor_a, levels_factor_b), group_n = n).factorial_ANOVA() ``` Given the following data, use a use a 2-Factor ANOVA with $\alpha = {0.01}$ to analyze the following data


## Full Group Summary Data
$T_{A1B1} = {358} \quad M_{A1B1} = {27.54}\quad SS_{A1B1} = {49.23} \quad n_{A1B1} = {13}$
$T_{A1B2} = {391} \quad M_{A1B2} = {30.08}\quad SS_{A1B2} = {66.92} \quad n_{A1B2} = {13}$
$T_{A1B3} = {353} \quad M_{A1B3} = {27.15}\quad SS_{A1B3} = {41.69} \quad n_{A1B3} = {13}$
$T_{A2B1} = {279} \quad M_{A2B1} = {21.46}\quad SS_{A2B1} = {51.23} \quad n_{A2B1} = {13}$
$T_{A2B2} = {326} \quad M_{A2B2} = {25.08}\quad SS_{A2B2} = {34.92} \quad n_{A2B2} = {13}$
$T_{A2B3} = {324} \quad M_{A2B3} = {24.92}\quad SS_{A2B3} = {62.92} \quad n_{A2B3} = {13}$
$\Sigma X^2 = {53749}$
$G = {2031}$

## Stage 1 ANOVA Calculations

Calculate the Degrees of Freedom: $df_{total}, df_{within}, \text{ and } df_{between}$

$df_{total} = N - 1$

$df_{total} = {78} - 1$

$df_{total} = {77}$


$df_{between} = k - 1$

$df_{between} = {6} - 1$

$df_{between} = {5}$


$df_{within} = N - K$

$df_{within} = {78} - {6}$

$df_{within} = {72}$


Calculate the Sum of Squares: $SS_{total}, SS_{within}, \text{ and } SS_{between}$

$SS_{total} = \Sigma X^2 - \frac{G^2}{N}$

$SS_{total} = {53749} - \frac{2031^2}{78}$

$SS_{total} = {53749} - \frac{4124961}{78}$

$SS_{total} = {53749} - {52884.12}$

$SS_{total} = {864.88}$


$SS_{within} = \Sigma SS_{inside\_each\_condition}$

$SS_{within} = {49.23 + 66.92 + 41.69 + 51.23 + 34.92 + 62.92}$

$SS_{within} = {306.91}$


$SS_{between} = SS_{total} - SS_{within}$

$SS_{between} = {864.88} - {306.91}$

$SS_{between} = {557.97}$


note: the other way to calculate $SS_{betwen}$ is:

$SS_{between} = \Sigma{\frac{T^2}{n}} - \frac{G^2}{N}$




## Stage 2 calculations for $Factor_A$

Summary Data for Factor_A
$T_{A_1} = {1102} \quad n_{A_1} = {39}$
$T_{A_2} = {929} \quad n_{A_2} = {39}$

State the Hypotheses
$H_0: \mu_1 = \mu_2$
$H_1: \mu_1 \ne \mu_2$

partition df for $Factor_A$

$df_{Factor_A} = k_{Factor_A} - 1$

$df_{Factor_A} = {2} - 1$

$df_{Factor_A} = {1}$


The decision criteria:

$F_{crit} = {7.0}, \alpha = {0.01}$

Partition the SS for $Factor_A$

Calculate $SS_{Factor_A}$

$\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_A}}^2}{n_{Factor_A}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1102}^2}{39} + \frac{{929}^2}{39}} - \frac{{2031}^2}{78}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {\frac{{1214404}}{39} + \frac{{863041}}{39}} - \frac{{4124961}}{78}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {{31138.56} + {22129.26}} - {52884.12}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {53267.82} - {52884.12}$

$SS_{Factor_A} = {383.7}$

Mean Squares for ${Factor_A}$

$MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{SS_{Factor_A}}{df_{Factor_A}}$

$MS_{Factor_A} = \frac{383.7}{1}$

$MS_{Factor_A} = {383.7}$

Calculate the F-Ratio for ${Factor_A}$

$F_{Factor_A} = \frac{MS_{Factor_A}}{MS_{Within}}$

$F_{Factor_A} = \frac{383.7}{4.26}$

$F_{Factor_A} = {90.07}$


Calculate $\eta_p^2 \text{ for } Factor_A$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{{SS_{{Factor_A}}}}{{SS_{{Total}} - SS_{{Factor_B}} - SS_{{AxB}}}}$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{383.7}{{864.88} - {123.07} - {51.2}}$

$\eta_p^2 = \frac{383.7}{690.61}$

$\eta_p^2 = {0.56}$

The results:

reject the null hypothesis, results are significant,

$F({1}, {72}) = {90.07}, p < {0.01}, \eta_p^2 = {0.56}$

## Stage 2 calculations for $Factor_B$

Summary Data for Factor_B
$T_{B_1} = {637} \quad n_{B_1} = {26}$
$T_{B_2} = {717} \quad n_{B_2} = {26}$

partition df for $Factor_B$

The decision criteria:

Partition the SS for $Factor_B$

Calculate $SS_{Factor_B}$

$\Sigma{\frac{{T_{Factor_B}}^2}{n_{Factor_B}}} - \frac{G^2}{N}$

$SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{637}^2}{26} + \frac{{717}^2}{26} + \frac{{677}^2}{26}} - \frac{{2031}^2}{78}$

$SS_{Factor_B} = {\frac{{405769}}{26} + \frac{{514089}}{26} + \frac{{458329}}{26}} - \frac{{4124961}}{78}$

$SS_{Factor_B} = {{15606.5} + {19772.65} + {17628.04}} - {52884.12}$

Mean Squares for ${Factor_B}$

## Stage 2 calculations for the $AxB$ interaction


State the Hypotheses
$H_0:$ There is no AxB interation
$H_1:$ There is an AxB interaction

Partition df for the interaction
